implementationNotes: Draft PR #39 created — awaiting Terraform plan

items.label: Infrastructure Written — Terraform
items.docNote:
## Infrastructure Changes

### Resources Created (cosmos.tf)
- `azurerm_cosmosdb_account.main` — Serverless Cosmos DB account (Session consistency)
- `azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_database.main` — SQL database 'sample-app-db'
- `azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_container.tasks` — **Tasks** container (partition key: /workspaceId)
- `azurerm_cosmosdb_sql_role_assignment.func_data_contributor` — Function App MI → Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor

### Outputs Added (in cosmos.tf)
- `cosmosdb_endpoint` — Cosmos DB account endpoint URL
- `cosmosdb_database_name` — Database name ('sample-app-db')

### Function App Settings Added (main.tf)
- `COSMOSDB_ENDPOINT` — Cosmos DB endpoint for DefaultAzureCredential auth
- `COSMOSDB_DATABASE_NAME` — Database name for container operations
- `MAX_TASKS_PER_WORKSPACE` — Task limit per workspace (default: 500)

### APIM OpenAPI Spec Updated (api-sample.openapi.yaml)
- `GET /tasks` — List all tasks (operationId: listTasks)
- `POST /tasks` — Create a task (operationId: createTask)
- `PATCH /tasks/{id}/status` — Update task status (operationId: updateTaskStatus)
- Components: Task, CreateTask, UpdateTaskStatus, TaskStatus, ErrorResponse schemas

### Hooks Updated
- `.apm/hooks/validate-infra.sh` — Cosmos DB reachability check (curl COSMOSDB_ENDPOINT)

### Terraform Plan Summary
- **0 to add, 10 to change, 0 to destroy**
- All Cosmos DB resources already exist in remote state (from previous deployment)
- Changes are in-place updates only (APIM API spec, Function App settings, Entra AD provider drift)

### Note
cosmos.tf includes the full Cosmos DB account/database/RBAC setup because PR #35 (webhook-dispatcher) was already applied to Azure but the .tf files were not present in this branch. Without cosmos.tf, terraform plan would have destroyed the existing resources.
